message:
feat: AI Diagnose button on failing CI/CD workflow items (#8731)

* feat: AI Diagnose button on failing CI/CD workflow items

Fixes #8728

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: extract hardcoded 'Diagnose with AI' to TITLE_DIAGNOSE constant

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
